title: Initialize array via function within package

features.name: package typedef unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a package-scoped typedef creating an unpacked array type using a localparam size

features.name: function returning unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a function with an implicit return value that is an unpacked array, where array elements are assigned via indexed function name

features.name: localparam array initialized via function call
features.description: Code should include a localparam of unpacked array type that is initialized by calling a function which returns the same array type
